name: Themes
author: Misty
overview: Themes is Misty's built-in theme builder. It lets users apply curated presets like Gruvbox Dark, Tokyo Night, and Catppuccin Mocha, then fine-tune the app's core color tokens without editing config files by hand.
capabilities: Apply Misty Dark, Gruvbox Dark, Tokyo Night, or Catppuccin Mocha presets instantly
Edit named theme tokens such as accent, border, text, and background colors
Persist theme changes across app restarts
permissions: Write access to Misty appearance settings
getting_started: Open Themes from Settings or the plugin launcher.
Apply Gruvbox Dark, Tokyo Night, or Catppuccin Mocha to preview a preset instantly.
Adjust token hex values and press Apply Edits to save your custom palette.
changelog: v0.1.0 - Added the first theme builder with Gruvbox Dark, Tokyo Night, Catppuccin Mocha, and Misty Dark presets.
